paper_threads.summary: Tweet about OmniReset framework for training robot policies using large-scale RL and diverse resets for contact-rich manipulation tasks.
Discussion about a research project involving large-scale RL in simulation without demonstrations that has been surprising over the past year.
Research on AI sycophancy and its deeper harms beyond just feeling inauthentic when AI calls ideas 'fantastic'.
EleutherAI shares research on subliminal prompting propagation across networks of interacting agents and safety concerns.
Simple math optimization to speed up GDN (likely referring to a neural network architecture) prefill operations.

announcements.summary: Slime v0.2.4 release focusing on profiling and observability with rollout trace timeline viewer and real-time W&B reporting.
Cohere Transcribe ranks #2 on Open ASR Leaderboard and #1 for multilingual applications, with mention of Parakeet 0.6.

discussions.summary: Discussion about interpretability work being important since suitable metrics for optimization haven't been found yet.
Commentary that Europe will not build frontier AI models, suggesting it's essentially dead and everything should stop.
Experience report on reaching the end of Opus context window, finding compaction becomes useless and recommending fresh sessions.
Observation about surprising holes in Opus model's internal knowledge when discussing science/math concepts, attributing it to PDF crawl problems.
Recommendation to switch from Ollama to llama.cpp and from OpenClaw to Hermes, calling these 'basics at this point'.
